# TrustFeed - AI Content Transparency Platform

## Project Overview
This is an Angular 17+ proof-of-concept social media application that demonstrates transparency features for AI-generated content.

## Key Features
- AI-Generated content declaration by authors
- Community feedback/voting on content authenticity
- Visual indicators for AI vs human content
- Content filtering by authenticity status

## Development
- Run `ng serve` to start development server
- Navigate to `http://localhost:4200`
- The app uses Angular standalone components and signals

## Project Structure
- `src/app/components/` - UI components (header, feed, create-post, post-card)
- `src/app/services/` - Business logic and state management
- `src/app/models/` - TypeScript interfaces

## Styling
- Uses SCSS with CSS variables
- Dark theme with gradient accents
- Responsive design with mobile-first approach
